## How to use


* Pick an issuer of interest from the tables above.

* Look up its `ids_in_scope` array in `_index_by_issuer.json` 
to get the IKMK IDs to work with.

* Each ID resolves to `scripts/cache/ikmk/<id>.json` 
(IKMK record, CC BY-SA 4.0 / PDM 1.0).
